company_profile.description: Managed IT, cybersecurity, and unified communications service provider for mid-market businesses across the US.
company_profile.note: Formerly TelePacific Communications; rebranded to TPx 2017

founders_ceo.note: PE-backed company formed through multiple acquisitions; founded as TelePacific in 1998 by Ken Bisnoff and Dick Jalkut

funding_financial.total_raised: PE-backed; Siris Capital Group acquired majority stake
funding_financial.note: Multiple rounds of PE recapitalization; previously backed by Investcorp
